extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI Michał won a photo finish after escaping with COSNEFROY at 2km to go, defeating VANDERPOELS late chase despite being marked by multiple teams.
tactical_patterns: INEOS Grenadiers deployed Turner-led four-man train to isolate VANDERPOORT, forcing him to chase alone despite being favorite.
KWIATKOWSKI-PIDCOCK tandem hesitated to commit 33.8km out, allowing marked riders to sit in rather than risk leading.
Two-man break at 2km survived despite 20-second gap because chasers marked VANDERPOORT instead of organizing pursuit.

rider_signals.VANDERPOORT Mathieu: negative: isolated early by INEOS train strategy, forced to chase final move alone while rivals marked him instead of cooperating
rider_signals.TURNER Ben: positive: executed aggressive pacemaking on climbs to splinter field and burn rival domestiques before 33km mark
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: neutral: strong enough to pressure at 33.8km but unclear team leadership with KWIATKOWSKI prevented decisive move
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: won from two-up despite apparent hesitation earlier, suggesting tactical patience over premature commitment
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: neutral: UAE attempted move but lacked follow-through when marked, revealing insufficient strength or team support
rider_signals.COSNEFROY Benoît: positive: AG2R answered break at 2km showing sprint capacity from reduced group others underestimated
